text:
social media, virtual online communities, also known as socials. Attributes include: 
- subclass of: "communications media"
- Commons category: "Social media"
- instance of: "industry",
 "communications media",
 "genre"
- side effect: "disinformation",
 "misinformation",
 "catfishing"
- different from: "social network"
- studied by: "media studies",
 "social"
- uses: "Internet"
